notes: Runs cost is the exact sum of cost_usd over 390 per-instance trajectory files (130 instances * 3 variants).

Judge cost is an estimate at Anthropic published rates: 390 sonnet calls (3 variants * 130 paired instances) at ~$0.015/call and 89 opus inter-judge calls at ~$0.075/call. The runtime CostTracker tracked these in-memory but the total was not persisted to disk; the estimate uses the per-call shape (~3000 input + ~400 output tokens).
Hard budget cap was $135; actual project spend is well under cap.
